datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: This privacy policy informs you which personal data is processed when using JobTRIX and for what purpose.
datenschutz.responsibleBody:
[Placeholder: Company name]
[Placeholder: Street and house number]
[Placeholder: Postal code and city]
Email: [Placeholder: kontakt@example.com]
datenschutz.authBody: We use NextAuth for registration and login. Your email address and a hashed password are stored. An authenticated session uses a session token.
datenschutz.profileBody: The data you enter in your profile (e.g. name, address, education, work experience, qualifications, interests and photo) is stored to generate your application documents.
datenschutz.aiBody: To generate cover letters and resumes, your profile data and the job posting are sent to the Anthropic Claude API.
datenschutz.jobSearchBody: For the job search including radius search we use the job search API of the German Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit). Your search terms and location data are sent to this API.
datenschutz.paymentBody: Payments for paid packages are processed via Stripe. Payment data is processed directly by Stripe and is not stored by us.
datenschutz.emailBody: We use the email service provider Brevo to send application emails as well as account-related emails (e.g. password reset).
datenschutz.hostingBody: [Placeholder: Hosting provider details will follow in a later phase]
datenschutz.retentionBody: Your data is stored as long as your account exists. In the "Account & Privacy" section of your profile you can download your data or delete your account at any time.
datenschutz.cookiesBody: We use only technically necessary cookies (e.g. for your login session). No tracking takes place, so no cookie consent banner is required.
